# Malik Abbas — Crypto PR, BD & Market Entry Professional

> Malik Abbas is a crypto professional based in Karachi, Pakistan, and the founder of CoinConnect, Pakistan's first dedicated crypto market entry agency. He is the only crypto professional in Pakistan who has personally managed PR, business development, country operations, marketing, and community building for international cryptocurrency exchanges — with proven delivery for Bybit, CoinEx, and BingX.

## Key Facts

- Full Name: Malik Abbas
- Professional Title: Crypto PR & BD Professional | Founder, CoinConnect
- Location: Karachi, Pakistan
- Industry: Cryptocurrency, Public Relations, Business Development
- Experience: 4+ years in crypto industry
- Education: BS Commerce (Marketing), University of Karachi, 2020-2024
- Company: CoinConnect (coinconnect.site)
- Age at Bybit CEO deal: 24

## Career Arc

- Started as an intern at CoinEx (cryptocurrency exchange)
- Promoted to PR manager for three countries (Pakistan, Philippines, Bangladesh) within 1.5 years
- Founded CoinConnect, Pakistan's first crypto market entry agency, as a solo operation
- At age 24, signed a direct PR and BD partnership with Ben Zhou, CEO of Bybit (top-5 global exchange) — as a one-person agency with zero employees

## Proven Track Record

- 225+ KOL (Key Opinion Leader) deals closed across three exchanges
- 50+ KOLs in active network, ready to deploy for campaigns
- 25+ events organized from scratch across all major Pakistani cities
- 5,000+ total event attendees with measurable ROI on every event
- 3 exchanges delivered for: Bybit, CoinEx, BingX
- 3 countries managed: Pakistan, Philippines, Bangladesh
- 8,000+ students trained through influencer marketing course on Extreme Commerce Video Boot Camp
- Featured on K21 News (Pakistani television)
- Handled crisis communications for exchanges under pressure
- Bilingual operations in English and Urdu

## Network and Access

- Direct partnership with Bybit CEO Ben Zhou
- Personally knows KuCoin CEO (network relationship, not client)
- Strong connections with Binance team (network relationship, not client)
- Connected to PVARA (Pakistan Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority)
- Direct relationships with Pakistan's top financial players and institutional investors
- Media contacts including journalists and TV editors
- International network across Dubai, Singapore, and other markets

## Five Roles Proven

- PR Manager: Media relations, press strategy, brand positioning for 3 exchanges across 3 countries
- Business Development Manager: Built exchange partnerships, KOL networks, and strategic alliances from zero
- Country Manager: Operated as Pakistan representative for CoinEx and BingX, managing all local operations
- Marketing Manager: Full-funnel campaigns — KOL programs, content strategy, events, social media
- Community Manager: Built Telegram, Discord, and social communities from scratch to thousands of members

## Services Through CoinConnect

- Crypto exchange PR and media relations
- Business development and partnership building
- Market entry strategy and country-level operations
- KOL and influencer management
- Community building and management
- Marketing strategy and execution
- Offline event production
- Crisis communications
- Go-to-market strategy design
- Competitive intelligence
- Vernacular content strategy (Urdu/English)
